title: Global Payments (GPN) to Post Q1 Earnings: Can it Beat Estimates?
text: Global Payments' (GPN) first-quarter results are likely to reflect profit growth in Merchant Solutions and Issuer Solutions businesses.

title: Analyst: these two stocks are worth owning in the payments space
text: Stephens' analyst Charles Nabhan remained cautious on the “payments” space at large on Wednesday, but said there still are a few stocks worth owning in this sector at present. Nabhan sees a 35% upside in Block Inc One of the names he likes in the payments space is Block Inc (NYSE: SQ).

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Global Payments (GPN) Stock Now
text: Improving revenues stemming from strong segmental contributions, pursuing technology advancements and adequate cash generation abilities are likely to continue driving Global Payments (GPN).
